testcase.name: Simple E2E Tests › should load home page
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › specs\simple.spec.js:4:5 › Simple E2E Tests › should load home page ─────────────────
Error: expect(page).toHaveTitle(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /Image Harvest/ Received string: "AutoImage - AI Image Generator" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveTitle" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "AutoImage - AI Image Generator"
4 | test('should load home page', async ({ page }) => { 5 | await page.goto('http://localhost:3200/'); > 6 | await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/Image Harvest/); | ^ 7 | }); 8 | 9 | test('should have basic elements', async ({ page }) => { at C:\wamp64\www\image-harvest\tests\e2e\specs\simple.spec.js:6:28
